# Decision Timeline

**Auto-generated** — do not edit by hand. This is the high-level
timeline across all decisions in this repo: direct-on-main entries,
per-feature-branch logs in `docs/decisions-branches/`, and the
archived rotations in `docs/decisions-archive.md`. The granular
detail (reasoning, alternatives, implications) lives in the source
file linked on each row — agents should dig in there as needed.

Regenerated by `logmind timeline --write docs/timeline.md` on every
PR's CI run, so this file is always coherent with current `main`.

---
